title: Backpropagation Flow: Calculating Gradients Through a Neural Network
description: A flowchart illustrating the reverse-pass process of backpropagation, showing how the error gradient is calculated layer-by-layer using the chain rule from vector calculus.
relationships: Forward pass flows left to right (x → h1 → h2 → ŷ → L)
Backward pass flows right to left (∂L/∂ŷ → ∂L/∂h2 → ∂L/∂h1 → ∂L/∂x)
Each backward step applies the chain rule to compute the gradient
Final gradients are used to update the network weights (W)
